SELECT reinterpretAsFloat32(toUInt32(1)) AS float_value FROM test_reinterpret;
SELECT reinterpretAsFloat32(toFloat64(3.14)) AS float_value FROM test_reinterpret;
SELECT reinterpretAsFloat32(toFloat32(-0.1)) AS float_value FROM test_reinterpret;
SELECT (SELECT reinterpretAsFloat32(value) FROM test_reinterpret) AS subquery_result;
CREATE TABLE nested_table (id UInt32, data Float64);
SELECT reinterpretAsFloat32(data) FROM nested_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT reinterpretAsFloat32(data) + reinterpretAsFloat32(toInt32(2)) FROM nested_table WHERE id = 2;
SELECT reinterpretAsFloat32(toFixedString(4, 'test')) AS float_value FROM (SELECT value FROM test_reinterpret ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 1);
